---
title: "Collected Notes"
date: "2023-03-23"
slug: "collected-notes"
---
On this page you can find a repository of my collected class lecture notes, and notes and slides from research talks and also my notes on various physics topics.

# Class Lecture Notes

*Table omitted from the static migration: class-lecture-notes.*

# Presentation Slides and Notes

*Table omitted from the static migration: research-talk-slides.*

# Miscellaneous Notes

*Table omitted from the static migration: miscellaneous-notes.*

# Student Project Reports

*Table omitted from the static migration: msc-project-reports.*
